_meta.oracle_plugin: Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp

class_legend.A: strategy / same-tier different-carry / no-op (pack working as designed: source-tier inputs vs oracle final-values)
class_legend.C: our error - wrong value, dangling ref, missed field, or contradicts Requiem ladder
class_legend.D: oracle-only Reqtificator output-stamp; our omission is doctrine-correct

_meta.note_on_counts: Records categorized by WORST class present (C>B>D>A). A record may carry several delta-classes; per_record.classes lists all present.

tier_mappings_used.REQ_Weapon_Steel_Sword_013989: Requiem SOURCE Damage8/Crit4/Reach1/Speed1  ->  RftI FINAL Damage48/Crit48/Reach0.7/Speed1. Test carried the SOURCE verbatim; oracle wrote a bumped FINAL (~60-66 on named uniques).
tier_mappings_used.reqtificator_scaling: Weapon Damage/Crit ~x6 and Reach 1->0.7 are Reqtificator transforms (carry source, do not hand-stamp). Armor AR ~x1.17 (test 300 : oracle 350 = 6:7 across the Blades set). Gold Value is NOT a clean Reqtificator scale (weapon values ranged 1x-23x) => value is per-item derived, so value gaps are genuine divergences, not source-vs-final.
tier_mappings_used.EncDraugr01Template_03B547: NpcLevel = 1 (Respawn). This is the de-level base the test's template-inherit NPCs inherit Stats/Traits from; Requiem decouples difficulty from level so a lvl-1 base is playable, but it FLATTENS all inheritors to the same basic-draugr tier (oracle differentiated: disciples 28 / mummies 20).

our_errors.why: WeapMaterialSilver (source input) omitted; oracle tags it silver (anti-undead bonus). Test carried base-material keyword only, losing the silver functional property.
Nox_KW_Staff_Destruction4 (Magic Redone staff-tier classifier, a source input) omitted; staff not tiered into Requiem's staff system. Also test set Data.Skill=Destruction that oracle drops (minor).
REQ_AmmoWeight_None (source weight-class keyword) omitted; arrow gets wrong Requiem weight class. (RFTI_Exclusions_NoDamageRescale also omitted = class-D, correct.)

IngotSteel + Craftsmanship vs oracle ingotSilver + AdvancedBlacksmithing. Silver material missed on the recipe too (pairs with the weapon's missing WeapMaterialSilver).

systematic_findings.flag_clobber: Literal Set on the Flags field (NPC Configuration.Flags AND spell Flags) replaces the WHOLE flag set, silently dropping every bit the lane did not re-list. Hits all 6 spells (ManualCostCalc), ~all NPCs (AutoCalcStats), and critically the identity/safety bits on named NPCs (Female, Essential, Unique, IsGhost, Invulnerable, DoesNotBleed). Documented in write-results.json as the 'FLAG SEMANTICS' literal-Set note. Root cause is the esp-writer, not the per-lane derivation, but the shipped plugin is defective. This is the single largest error source.
systematic_findings.cobj_material_default: The COBJ/crafting-recipe lane defaulted nearly every recipe to IngotSteel + Craftsmanship perk regardless of the item's real material; oracle matched ingot+smithing-perk to material (Gold/Moonstone/Ebony/Silver/Legendary). 6 of 8 recipes affected. Note oracle keeps WeapMaterialSteel on the WEAPON keyword (for combat) but crafts from the visual material - the recipe should reflect the physical material.
systematic_findings.perk_over_carry: Melee NPCs received full 11-18-perk supersets copied live from already-Reqtified template comparables (EncSkeleton01Melee1H=13, EncDraugr01Template=10) while the oracle carried 0-2 perks. Classified B here (genuine philosophy divergence) but flagged as a DOUBLE-STAMP risk that contradicts the pack's own requiem-perk-assignment doctrine ('never hand-place Reqtificator-stamped perks; source 5 -> build 50'). Affects BladeGuardian01-04, Umbra, SadraakaDraugr, AnonymousOrc, GuardianOfColdharbour, CorruptedRedguard, DraukiirTemplate, Telrav/Irlav Baenius.
systematic_findings.npc_stat_model: Test model = AutoCalcStats OFF + explicit Level/HealthOffset + copied perks/skills; oracle model = AutoCalcStats ON + sparse perks + let build compute. Both internally coherent (classified B), but the test consistently sets LOWER fixed levels than the oracle (10v30, 12v24, 15v24, 18v30) and copied ESM baked skills may be mis-tiered for the new Requiem level.
systematic_findings.caster_archetype: Test gave casters (Imhotep, and over-coverage Basil/Arlowe/Adrian) a Restoration/healing perk loadout (ImprovedHealing, Respite); oracle gave Imhotep Conjuration+Destruction (battlemage). Possible systematic caster mis-classification (B).

Requiem creature-race traits: Health 250->350, UnarmedDamage 15->60, +Requiem racial ability + 6 creature-trait keywords. Sanity flag: Starting Stamina 500->10000 / Regen 10->1000 (high, but consistent w/ Requiem big-creature pattern).
SkillBoost 5->35, Health 50->300, UnarmedDamage 1->20, +Requiem undead ability + keyword. Stamina->10000 (same high-creature pattern).
Health 75->300, UnarmedDamage 10->35, Regen HP 0->1.5 +RegenHpInCombat, +Dawnguard attack-race/ability + Requiem keyword. Consistent creature tuning.

0 deltas vs ESM base - the only meaningful field (HealthOffset) was a DEFERRED placeholder, so the record was 'patched' with no effective change.

over_coverage.over_coverage_summary: Consumables (INGR+ALCH) and RACE over-coverage is GENUINE curated under-coverage that the pack filled with grounded Requiem values (the oracle never touched races or these ingredients) - a real breadth win. The over-coverage NPC casters/bosses are purposeful in their combat derivation (class/CS/perks) but share the same flag-clobber defect (dropping Essential/IsGhost/Invulnerable/Unique) as the shared set. One creature (SpiderGiant) was an empty no-op due to a deferred placeholder. Armor over-coverage could not be cleanly sampled (the only NonPlayable armor defined in the ESM is oracle-owned; the ~16 armor writes are other pieces not enumerated here).

notes: Test plugin is off-load-order (disabled); all test-side reads were via housecarl_diff_record's on-disk file reader (read_record refuses disabled plugins). Diffs are complete (not truncated) for every record.

Dangling refs confirmed unresolved via housecarl_resolve: 01CE0E:Skyrim.esm (Imhotep Class) and 0D799A:Requiem.esp (caster perk-set node, referenced by Imhotep/ImhotepB + over-coverage Basil/Arlowe/guards). These are 2 of the 8 dangling refs write-results.json flagged.
The 21 skipped/flagged oracle records were NOT re-adjudicated here (already covered by adjudication-skips-flags.md).

Biggest RIGHT: weapon/consumable/ammo SOURCE-carry doctrine works - 7 weapons are pure strategy+output-stamp (steel source 8/4 carried verbatim, all REQ_DamageType/RFTI output keywords correctly omitted). This is the pack working exactly as designed.

Biggest WRONG: the literal-Set Flags write clobber (esp-writer artifact) is the top error source - it silently strips ESM/curated flag bits across all 6 spells (ManualCostCalc) and every named/unique NPC (Female, Essential, Unique, IsGhost, Invulnerable). Recommend the writer union-merge flags instead of replacing.

Second WRONG (derivation): COBJ crafting-recipe lane defaulted 6/8 recipes to Steel ingot + Craftsmanship perk regardless of true material; perk-assignment lane copied full 11-18-perk Reqtified-template supersets onto melee NPCs where the oracle carried 0-2 (double-stamp risk contradicting the pack's own anti-double-stamp doctrine).
